testsuite.name: com.shopzen.analytics.network.EventUploaderTest

testcase.name: uploadBatch returns true on successful 200 response

testsuite.system-err: May 17, 2026 5:08:26 PM okhttp3.internal.platform.Platform log INFO: --> POST http://kubernetes.docker.internal:60420/events May 17, 2026 5:08:26 PM okhttp3.internal.platform.Platform log INFO: Content-Type: application/json;
